description:
No spec subject (epic groups stages; each stage carries its own Advances:)

Jira: TBD
(Jira MCP unavailable at /distill time — record TBD; PR-creation hook should backfill.)

Distilled from mega-plan run 20260513-083104-claude.
Plan source: ~/Documents/my-vault/LLMs/plans/-Users-mz-dev-mz-my_ai/2026-05-13-test-faithfulness-verifier/runs/20260513-083104-claude/05-refined-plan.md
Spec dir: .spec/

The library was renamed from the plan-era `verify_tests` to `mutagen_ex`. All
module paths, mix task names, and test paths in the stage tickets use the new
naming:
- `mix verify_tests` → `mix mutagen`
- `VerifyTests.*` → `MutagenEx.*`
- `Mix.Tasks.VerifyTests` → `Mix.Tasks.Mutagen`
- `lib/verify_tests/` → `lib/mutagen_ex/`
- `test/verify_tests/` → `test/mutagen_ex/`

The S2 spike is GATING: a negative outcome on any of the 4 fixture modules
or the 100-iteration loop escalates to the user (fallback architecture
decision needed). Do not silently pivot.

Verification command: `mix test` (strict pre-merge: `mix compile --warnings-as-errors && mix test`).

Stage children correspond to the refined plan's S1-S8 (S0 is planning-side
and not actionable in this repo). Parallelism notes are in each stage's
"Depends on" field.
